//: Order matters: more-specific rewrites first. The /api/* rule proxies
every backend call from the registration site to the Node/Express
backend (Railway). Without this, /api/* matched the SPA-fallback rule
below and Vercel returned index.html — the frontend's request() helper
then threw a 'Failed to fetch / not JSON' 404, softCall fell back to
the localStorage simulation, and confirmation emails were silently
If the backend host moves, update DESTINATION in both rewrites or set
VITE_API_BASE in Vercel (env var) to override at build time.
